title: UHG Null FAIL: NULL_CONDITION_VIOLATED вҖ” G claimed as 6 instead of 5
_fixture_purpose: Canonical fail fixture. Generator (d=2,e=1): correct G=dВІ+eВІ=5. A common error is to confuse G with the perimeter or claim G=d+e+1=4 or round incorrectly. Here G is claimed as 6 (perhaps from G=dВІ+eВІ+1=6, an off-by-one error). With F=3,C=4,G=6: FВІ+CВІ-GВІ=9+16-36=-11вү 0 вҶ’ NULL_CONDITION_VIOLATED. Additionally Gвү dВІ+eВІ=5 вҶ’ BLUE_QUADRANCE_MISMATCH. Both checks fire; the Gaussian decomposition also fails (Gвү |Z|ВІ) вҶ’ GAUSSIAN_DECOMP_MISMATCH. UN7: null_quadrance declared as 0 but actual FВІ+CВІ-GВІ=-11 вҖ” validator computes independently so UN7 does not fire (null_quadrance field itself = 0 matches the declared value; the violation is detected at UN5).

uhg_null._error: WRONG: G=6 claimed instead of correct G=dВІ+eВІ=5; null condition 9+16-36=-11вү 0

validation_checks.details: declared null_quadrance=0 вң“ (field value; UN5 catches the actual violation)
